Guideline: Formal register with Lei implied. Subject pronoun typically omitted; verb conjugation carries formality. Tu must not appear in the UI.
Professional, precise, and instructional. Neutral stance on pay data.
Standard Italian grammatical gender. Use gender-neutral constructions where natural.
Sentence case throughout. Italian does not capitalize job titles, months, languages, or nationalities. Never use title case.
Straight double quotes (") used consistently in existing TM. Angle quotes («») acceptable as alternative. Be consistent within a screen.
Standard Italian punctuation. Percent: 15% (no space). Decimal separator: comma (,). Thousands: period (.).
Noun-adjective phrases: Divario retributivo, Fascia retributiva, Analisi del personale, Gruppo di confronto.
Kept in English: PayAnalytics, benchmark (44 occurrences in TM — do not translate), KPI, p-value, API, CSV, feedback, bonus. Italian professionals use these daily.
Imperative for action labels: Aggiungi filtro, Esporta lista, Confronta. Subject omitted.
Actions: Aggiungi [noun], Elimina [noun], Esporta [noun]. Confirmations: Sei sicuro di voler...? Success: ...salvato/a correttamente.

Pay gap=Divario retributivo; Adjusted pay gap=Divario retributivo rettificato; Unadjusted pay gap=Divario retributivo non rettificato; Gender pay gap=Divario retributivo di genere; Pay band=Fascia retributiva; Salary range=Fascia salariale; Compensation=Retribuzione; Salary=Stipendio; Raise=Aumento; Benchmark=Benchmark (kept in English); Pay equity=Parità retributiva; Equal pay=Parità retributiva; Job evaluation=Valutazione del lavoro; Workforce analytics=Analisi del personale; Headcount=Numero di dipendenti; Dataset=Set di dati; Comparison group=Gruppo di confronto; Employee group=Gruppo di dipendenti; Maternity leave=Congedo di maternità; Bonus=Bonus (kept); Compa-ratio=Compa-ratio (kept)
